summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification using the supplied preflight artifact as live GitHub state. No canonical was selected because the job is not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are quarantined individually; all other listed PRs are preserved for maintainer review or follow-up.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive host-local attachment boundary work is outside Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Useful but unresolved standalone infrastructure PR; no safe close or merge action in plan mode.
Standalone useful PR awaiting maintainer review; merge is blocked by job frontmatter.
Related to the WebChat replay fix family, but canonical selection between open PRs is outside this inventory shard.
Standalone feature/compatibility PR with unresolved review work; no closure action is justified.
Useful small PR remains open for maintainer review; failing check and no merge permission block merge planning.
Authenticated webhook ingress and security-boundary changes require central security handling.
Dependency and UI rendering security-boundary concerns are out of scope for Clownfish cleanup.
Standalone PR needs real behavior proof; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Maintainer product/docs policy judgment is needed before keeping, revising, or closing this commercial hardware docs addition.

needs_human: #87627 requires maintainer judgment on whether commercial turnkey hardware appliance documentation belongs in Platforms docs or should be handled as an external-plugin/vendor follow-up.
